world_traits.name: Haze
world_traits.description: Visibility reduced. All shooting beyond 12" is at -1 to Hit.

world_traits.name: Industrial World
world_traits.description: Buildings and structures provide Hard Cover.

world_traits.name: Hot Climate
world_traits.description: Characters carrying 3+ items lose 1" of movement per round.

world_traits.name: Cold Climate
world_traits.description: At the start of each round, roll 1D6. On a 1, one random crew member is Stunned.

world_traits.name: Toxic Atmosphere
world_traits.description: Any character knocked out of action must roll an additional injury check.

world_traits.name: Low Gravity
world_traits.description: All movement increased by 1". Grenades scatter an additional 1".

world_traits.name: High Gravity
world_traits.description: All movement reduced by 1" (minimum 3"). Jump moves are not possible.

world_traits.name: War-torn
world_traits.description: Roll 1D6 at start of battle. On 1-2, a random piece of terrain is destroyed.

world_traits.name: Heavily Policed
world_traits.description: Criminal enemy types are -1 to Combat Skill. Illegal items cost +50% more.

world_traits.name: Lawless
world_traits.description: Enemy reinforcements arrive 1 round earlier. +1 rival per campaign turn.

world_traits.name: Trade Hub
world_traits.description: Trading actions give +1 bonus item. Equipment costs are -10%.

world_traits.name: Frontier World
world_traits.description: Limited gear selection but lower prices. Only basic weapons and gear available.

world_traits.name: Tech Advanced
world_traits.description: Advanced weapons and gear available. Medical treatment +1 bonus.

world_traits.name: Pirate Haven
world_traits.description: Increased risk of rival encounters. Stolen goods available for trade.

world_traits.name: Unity Presence
world_traits.description: Unity patrols provide safety. Reduced chance of ambush events.
